'''mashodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:miang|miang]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:miang|miang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mashodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæshedeth|mæshedeth]] || [[word:mæshedej|mæshedej]] || [[word:mæshedesh|mæshedesh]] || [[word:mæshede|mæshede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mashoshodoth|mashoshodoth]] || [[word:mashoshodoj|mashoshodoj]] || [[word:mashoshodosh|mashoshodosh]] || [[word:mashoshodo|mashoshodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mashodoth|mashodoth]] || [[word:mashodoj|mashodoj]] || [[word:mashodosh|mashodosh]] || [[word:mashodo|mashodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mashofdoth|mashofdoth]] || [[word:mashofdoj|mashofdoj]] || [[word:mashofdosh|mashofdosh]] || [[word:mashofdof|mashofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mashodotho|mashodotho]] || [[word:mashodojo|mashodojo]] || [[word:mashodosho|mashodosho]] || [[word:mashodoko|mashodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mashodoth|mashodoth]] || [[word:mashodoj|mashodoj]] || [[word:mashodosh|mashodosh]] || [[word:mashodo|mashodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mashodothol|mashodothol]] || [[word:mashodojol|mashodojol]] || [[word:mashodoshol|mashodoshol]] || [[word:mashodokol|mashodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mashodothotho|mashodothotho]] || [[word:mashodojojo|mashodojojo]] || [[word:mashodoshosho|mashodoshosho]] || [[word:mashodoko|mashodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mashodothon|mashodothon]] || [[word:mashodojon|mashodojon]] || [[word:mashodoshon|mashodoshon]] || [[word:mashodokon|mashodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mashodothoro|mashodothoro]] || [[word:mashodojoro|mashodojoro]] || [[word:mashodoshoro|mashodoshoro]] || [[word:mashodokoro|mashodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
